# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One to three sentences. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (patch)
- [ ] New feature or content (minor)
- [ ] Redesign or breaking change (major)
- [ ] Documentation only (no version impact)
- [ ] Chore / maintenance (no version impact)

## Checklist

- [ ] Read `CLAUDE.md` before making changes
- [ ] No virtual workshop language introduced
- [ ] No pricing introduced
- [ ] CTAs are "Request a Workshop" or "Get a Quote"
- [ ] Nav changes made in `components.js` only (not individual HTML files)
- [ ] Page loads without console errors
- [ ] All nav links resolve
- [ ] Header and footer render correctly on affected pages
- [ ] Mobile layout tested at 375px
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if release-worthy
